onboarding.s1_desc: Life Switch protects your most important information and ensures it reaches the right people if something happens to you.
onboarding.s2_desc: Every secret is encrypted on your device before being saved. Only you can read your content.
onboarding.s3_desc: Add the people who should receive your secrets. They will only be notified if you stop responding.
onboarding.s4_desc: Press Pulse regularly to show you're active. If you stop, Life Switch will automatically notify your contacts.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: You press the Pulse button regularly. If the countdown reaches zero, your secrets are automatically sent to your beneficiaries.
faq.a2: Yes, everything is end-to-end encrypted using AES-256. Not even we can read your secrets.
faq.a3: Yes, you can permanently delete your account and all associated data from your profile settings.
faq.a4: Only the beneficiaries you have specifically designated will receive access if your timer expires.
faq.q5: What happens if I lose my access?
faq.a5: Your account is secured by your email or phone number. You can reset your access at any time to regain control of your vault.
faq.a6: Basic features are free. We will soon offer Premium options to increase your storage capacity and number of beneficiaries.
faq.q7: How are my loved ones notified?
faq.a7: As soon as the countdown expires, our system sends a secure email and SMS to your beneficiaries with access instructions.
legal.title: Legal & Privacy
legal.content: Life Switch protects your digital legacy. Data is stored encrypted on secure servers. Full GDPR compliance guaranteed.
legal.tos_desc: By using Life Switch, you agree to the following: (1) Lawful use only — you commit to storing only legal content that does not infringe third-party rights. (2) Responsibility — you are solely responsible for the content stored in your vault. (3) Service as-is — Life Switch is not liable for data loss due to technical failures. (4) Minimum age — the app is reserved for persons aged 17 and over. (5) Single account — creating multiple accounts to abuse the service is prohibited. (6) Terms updates — we reserve the right to modify these terms with prior notification.
legal.privacy_desc: Your personal data is handled with the utmost care: (1) Local encryption — your secrets are encrypted with AES-256 on your device before any transmission. We hold no decryption key. (2) Data collected — email or phone (authentication), display name, last Pulse timestamp, beneficiary list. (3) No resale — we do not sell, rent, or share your data for commercial purposes. (4) Limited sharing — your secrets are only transmitted to your designated beneficiaries, and only if your timer expires. (5) Access and deletion rights — you can delete all your data from the app or by contacting privacy@life-switch.app. (6) Cookies — we do not use third-party tracking cookies.
legal.deletion_desc: Under GDPR (Article 17), you can request total and irreversible deletion of all your data at any time: from the app (Profile → Delete my account), or by email at privacy@life-switch.app. We acknowledge within 48h and execute deletion within 30 days.
about.title: About
about.desc: Life Switch is a secure digital legacy service. It allows you to transmit your secrets, passwords and important messages to your loved ones if you stop showing signs of life.

settings.preview_desc: View the final email sent to contacts

pres.subtitle: Protect your digital legacy. Pass on your secrets to those who matter, when the time comes.
pres.trust_desc: Passwords, love letters, important instructions, photo & video memories… Life Switch watches over what matters to you and passes it on at the right time.
pres.footer: © {year} Life Switch — Your digital legacy, secured.
pres.f1_desc: A pulsing button you press regularly to confirm your presence. If you stop, your secrets are transmitted.
pres.f2_desc: Store your messages, codes, passwords and files in a secure vault. Photos and videos included.
pres.f3_desc: Designate your loved ones as beneficiaries. Each secret can be assigned to a specific person.
pres.f4_desc: Choose your timer (7 to 90 days), your language among 10 options, and keep absolute control.
carnet.welcome: Hello {name} ✨ I'm Carnet, your personal journal companion. I'm here to listen, help you explore your thoughts, and capture your precious moments. How are you today?
faq.specific_q: Specific question? Our team is ready to help you.

protocol.message_2_fallback: {name} has configured this message to be transmitted to you securely...
legal_page.privacy_engagement: Your privacy is the foundation of our architecture. We see nothing. We know nothing.
legal_page.tos_engagement: By using Life Switch, you place your digital legacy under high-level cryptographic protection.
legal_page.tos_section_1_content: Life Switch is an automated post-mortem transmission platform. The service guarantees the secure delivery of your archived data to your beneficiaries after irrefutable confirmation of your prolonged absence via our Pulse protocol.
legal_page.tos_section_2_content: You hold full ownership and responsibility for the stored content. Use of the service for storing illegal, hateful data or data violating third-party intellectual property rights is strictly prohibited and leads to immediate account closure.
legal_page.tos_section_3_content: Zero Knowledge: All data is encrypted locally (AES-256) before synchronization. Life Switch never possesses your encryption keys. In case of loss of your master password without a recovery phrase, your data will be technically irrecoverable.
legal_page.tos_section_4_content: The effectiveness of the transmission depends on the accuracy of the information provided for your beneficiaries. Life Switch cannot be held responsible for non-delivery due to obsolete contact details (invalid emails, deleted phone numbers).
legal_page.tos_section_5_content: Free accounts have a defined storage limit. Exceeding these quotas may block the creation of new secrets. Premium subscriptions allow for extending these limits and increasing the number of active beneficiaries.
legal_page.tos_section_6_content: An account without a valid 'Pulse' for more than one year after the successful transmission of its legacy may be archived or deleted to free up infrastructure resources, after repeated notifications to beneficiaries and the user.
legal_page.tos_section_7_content: These terms are subject to international law. Any dispute relating to the interpretation or execution of the service will be brought before the competent courts of the jurisdiction of the application editor.
legal_page.privacy_section_a_content: Your secrets are sealed in a cryptographic vault. The architecture is designed so that clear data never leaves your device without being previously transformed by your unique private keys.
legal_page.privacy_section_b_content: We apply the principle of data minimization. We only collect essential metadata: connection email, beneficiary identifiers, and anonymized connection logs for account security.
legal_page.privacy_section_c_content: In accordance with GDPR, deleting your account from the settings triggers an immediate 'Wipe' process. All occurrences of your data on our servers and cold backups are permanently erased within 30 days.
legal_page.privacy_section_d_content: Your data is hosted on highly redundant infrastructures located exclusively within the European Union (GDPR Zone), benefiting from the strictest legal protections in the world.
legal_page.privacy_section_e_content: Life Switch is a digital public utility service. We do not sell your data, do not use advertising cookies, and perform no algorithmic profiling for commercial purposes.
legal_page.privacy_section_f_content: Messages sent to your beneficiaries are transmitted via secure TLS tunnels. We recommend that your relatives set up two-factor authentication on their own messaging services for optimal security.
legal_page.privacy_section_g_content: Our infrastructure undergoes regular penetration tests. Any major security breach detected will be notified to the concerned users within 72 hours, in accordance with European directives.
legal_page.apple_eula_note: For iOS users, Apple's standard terms (EULA) apply in addition to our TOS.

premium.f1_desc: Protect as many secrets, codes, and memories as you wish.
premium.f2_desc: Send birthday messages to your loved ones for decades.

premium.f4_desc: Secure vault access with FaceID / Fingerprint.
premium.f5_desc: Direct access to our team for any assistance.
premium.footer: Subscription with no commitment. Cancel anytime in your store account settings.
premium.already_premium_desc: Thank you for your trust. Your legacy is under maximum protection.
